titles.title: I lift my eyes up unto the mountains

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lift my eyes up unto the mountains. Where does my help come from? My help comes from You, Maker of heaven creator of the earth.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, how I need You, Lord You are my only hope. You're my only prayer. So I will wait for You to come and rescue me. Come and give me life.
